Fairs/showsFrench Riviera

Antibes Art Fair

20 March 2020

The annual meeting of art and antique lovers on the French Riviera. Under the tent, you will find stalls built as apartments showcasing exceptional pieces of furniture, tables set with lovely china and silverware, but also galleries of signed paintings, jewelers and specialists of Art objects. In total one hundred exhibitors present objects, paintings or exquisite pieces of furniture.

Mas du Chanoine

Charming guesthouse in Saint-Paul de Vence, French Riviera. A 17th century farmhouse with modern comfort.
